title: I have automations related to dates set up on a board which no longer work
excerpt: I have automations set up on a board to move items to a different group and change status a set amount of days after a specific date is reached. These worked fine but have stopped working now. Monday.com help has check a…

posts.author: LouiseJ (Louise)
posts.cookedHtml: I have automations set up on a board to move items to a different group and change status a set amount of days after a specific date is reached. These worked fine but have stopped working now. Monday.com help has check and said they are correctly set up but they still aren’t working. It shows as if they ran successfully but actions don’t happen.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you turn them off and then back on? I know it sounds silly, but sometimes it helps?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Try duplicating the board to see if that fixes the issue? Automations were migrated in March 2024 to mondayDB so it shouldn’t be that… Also try re creating the automations from scratch.

posts.author: LouiseJ (Louise)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks - tried both of those strategies before posting.

posts.author: LouiseJ (Louise)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, I’d done that and deleted and re-entered

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you maybe have another automation that’s overwriting that? Check your activity log?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Louise, is this still an issue? If you are open to meeting over a google meet, I can try and help you troubleshoot this live. You will need to be an Admin user, or have an Admin on the call. Link is below.
